description: Comprehensive user activity analytics for Grafana administrators. Track individual user sessions, API usage patterns, authentication events, RBAC evaluations, and resource access. Filter by specific user to investigate activity.

panels.description: Dashboard header — Grafana Admin User Activity & Audit Analytics

options.content:
Grafana Admin — User Activity & Audit Analytics
Session Monitoring • Access Patterns • Authentication Analysis

panels.description: Users who have been active in the current session window.
panels.title: Active Users

panels.description: Total number of registered user accounts across all organizations.
panels.title: Total Users

panels.description: Number of currently active browser/API sessions. High session counts may indicate automation or shared accounts.
panels.title: Active Sessions

panels.description: Total number of organizations configured in Grafana.
panels.title: Organizations

panels.description: Rate of login attempts per minute across all instances.
panels.title: Login Rate

panels.description: Rate of failed login attempts per minute. Sustained spikes may indicate brute force attacks or misconfigured clients.
panels.title: Failed Login Rate

panels.description: User activity broken down by Grafana feature. Shows which capabilities are most utilized.
panels.title: API Activity by Category

panels.description: Total platform activity over time. The daily pattern reveals peak usage hours and off-hours baseline.
panels.title: Activity Heatmap by Hour

panels.description: Login attempt timeline. Correlate failed login spikes with security incidents.
panels.title: Login Activity Timeline

panels.description: Active sessions vs active users. Multiple sessions per user may indicate API automation or shared accounts.
panels.title: Session Activity

panels.description: Most frequently accessed API endpoints. Shows which features drive the most traffic.
panels.title: Top 15 Most Used API Endpoints

panels.description: Slowest API endpoints by P95 latency. These impact user experience the most.
panels.title: Top 15 Slowest API Endpoints (P95)

panels.description: Server errors by API endpoint. Identifies which handlers are failing.
panels.title: Errors by Handler

panels.description: Error breakdown by HTTP status code. 401/403=auth issues, 429=rate limiting, 5xx=server errors.
panels.title: Error Rate by Status Code

panels.description: Rate of RBAC permission checks. Scales with API request volume.
panels.title: RBAC Evaluation Rate

panels.description: RBAC evaluation latency at P50, P90, P95, and P99 percentiles. High latency impacts every API call.
panels.title: RBAC Latency Percentiles

panels.description: What percentage of total request latency is consumed by RBAC evaluation. High overhead means permissions are a bottleneck.
panels.title: RBAC as % of Request Latency

panels.description: Total number of dashboards across all organizations and folders.
panels.title: Total Dashboards

panels.description: Total number of configured data sources across all organizations.
panels.title: Total Data Sources

panels.description: Total number of alert rules configured across all organizations.
panels.title: Alert Rules

panels.description: Number of currently active (firing) alerts. High counts may indicate widespread issues.
panels.title: Active Alerts

panels.description: Total number of playlists created in Grafana.
panels.title: Total Playlists

panels.description: Total number of dashboard folders for organizational structure.
panels.title: Folders

panels.description: Navigation links to related Grafana admin dashboards.

options.content: Related Dashboards:   Admin Command Center | Access Security Analytics | DB Performance Deep Dive

title: Grafana Admin — User Activity & Audit Analytics
